revisedPrompt:
Create a polished wide landscape production illustration using the attached sprite sheet as the sole character-reference source and the attached mountain-refuge landscape as the environmental continuity source. Ignore/remove the sprite sheet’s magenta background entirely.

Scene: a final-victory / mission-complete moment at the end of a fully repaired side-profile mountain path, arriving at a warm refuge in late-afternoon golden light. Preserve the exact established identities, clothing, colors, accessories, and recognizable silhouettes of the two young human characters from the sprite sheet: (1) the orange-haired ground courier in teal-green tunic and scarf, coral shorts, olive messenger satchel, gloves and boots; (2) the teal-haired human flying rival with goggles, coral top, pale teal trousers, green scarf and the handmade wood-and-mint-fabric flying apparatus. Do not redesign, replace, or merge them.

Composition: very wide game-ending background, clean hand-drawn linework, flat pastel colors, whimsical storybook game aesthetic matching the supplied references. The repaired path runs in clear side-profile across the landscape and gently reaches the refuge on the right. Place the warm, inviting mountain refuge on the right third, with a softly glowing window, red-orange roof, small fence, pines, and rolling green hills continuous with the supplied refuge landscape. Keep the refuge and both figures safely inside crop margins.

Both characters have arrived near the right side. Show the courier standing comfortably with satchel, and the flying rival safely landed beside or just out of their lightweight flying machine. They share a friendly, understated moment—small relaxed smiles, a quiet nod or casual hand gesture—communicating mutual respect and completion rather than competition. No dramatic celebration.

Reserve the entire left and central portions as calm, open, low-detail negative space suitable for live HTML mission-summary text and a restart control: broad soft sky, gently layered distant hills, minimal clouds, no focal objects, no characters, and no high-contrast details there. Concentrate visual detail toward the lower-right and refuge area while maintaining a coherent panoramic landscape.

Late-afternoon lighting: warm peach-gold rim light, long soft shadows, pastel blue sky, cream clouds, gentle atmospheric depth. Production-final quality, crisp readable silhouettes, harmonious palette, no magenta.

Strict exclusions: no trophy, podium, confetti, scoreboard, baked-in text, letters, numbers, UI, buttons, title, logo, watermark, branding, signs with writing, copied outside characters, or imitation of any unrelated composition.
